beat.title: Leaving Karawa
beat.boundaryReason: Opening departure scene from Karawa through the first major trail analysis at the creature split site.
dateEvidence: The session opens the next morning after the attack on Karawa.
The party departs in pre-dawn light and reaches the track junction by midday or early afternoon.

beat.title: Choosing the Route
beat.boundaryReason: The party shifts from trail interpretation into route planning, first-night camp discussion, and the uneventful next day of northbound travel.
dateEvidence: The party decides to ride straight for Raven's Hold and makes camp after the first day.
A later DM transition marks the next day of travel as uneventful.

beat.title: Parley with Tharandros
beat.boundaryReason: The final scene is the long centaur parley, ending when Tharandros agrees to ride south and the party halts short of Raven's Hold.
dateEvidence: The centaur conversation follows immediately after the dawn encounter.
The session ends after the centaurs depart south and the party turns toward Raven's Hold.
